title: LandoCraft
description: This light-hearted and highly optimized mod pack is meant to help you find your creativity for building and adventure while maintaining a steady FPS count. Its main features are Cobblemon, Create, and plenty of mods for decorative furnishing
body: This light-hearted and highly optimized mod pack is meant to help you find your creativity for building, battling, and adventure while maintaining a steady FPS count. Its main features include Cobblemon, Create Mod, Farmer's Delight, Naturalist, and many more mods that will bring your creativity to life.
